ingest.title: Recent Activities
ingest.itemTemplate: I completed a Strava {type} named "{name}" covering {distance:km} in {moving_time:min} with an average heart rate of {average_heartrate} bpm on {start_date:date}.

ingest.title: GitHub Repositories
ingest.itemTemplate: I have a GitHub repository named "{name}" described as "{description}", primarily written in {language}. It has {stargazers_count} stars (last updated on {updated_at:date}). URL: {html_url}
